properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Mountains are still being moved Strongholds are still being loosed God we believe it Yes we can see that Wonders are still what You do

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Bodies are still being raised Giants are still being slayed God we believe it And yes we can see that Wonders are still what You do

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We are here for You Come and do what You do We are here for You Come and do what You do Set our hearts on You Come and do what You do ‘Cause we need a move We need a move

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Miracles happen when You move Healing is coming in this room Miracles happen when You move Heaven is coming

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: This is a move This is a move

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Burn like a Fire Blow like the Wind Come Holy Spirit We welcome You In
